checks.name: BiomeParticles coverage
checks.detail: All 8 biomes mapped in BIOME_PARTICLE_MAP. 7 particle types: rain/fireflies/mist/snow/leaves/embers/spores all configured with procedural ParticleProcessMaterial.

checks.name: RunEnvironmentManager wiring
checks.detail: setup()/start()/on_card_start()/on_card_end()/cleanup() API complete. BiomeParticles + BiomeVisualManager + CollectibleSpawner integrated. walk_segment_timing 5-15s per bible s.1.3.

checks.name: BrocDayNight integration
checks.detail: broc_day_night.gd: sun color/energy/pitch animated per time. Fog density varies at dawn/dusk. broceliande_forest_3d.gd:525-530 correctly calls _day_night.update() + _atmosphere.update(delta, _day_night.get_time()).

checks.name: BrocAtmosphere zone fog
checks.detail: 7 zone fog profiles (Z0-Z6). Mist curtains + god rays created procedurally. fog_dissolve.gdshader used for fog planes with fallback to StandardMaterial3D.

checks.name: BrocSeason shader overlay
checks.detail: seasonal_particles.gdshader attached via ShaderMaterial to CanvasLayer(layer=5). All 4 seasons configured: spring petals, summer haze, autumn leaves, winter snow.

checks.name: BrocScreenVfx shader attachment
checks.detail: broc_screen_vfx.gd:46-48 — comment says 'shader removed'. _shader_mat is NEVER assigned (no ShaderMaterial created). _set_shader() calls at line 169 do nothing since _shader_mat is null. ALL screen VFX effects (vignette, flash_red, glitch, scanlines, desaturate, hue_shift) are silently broken. The SHADER_PATH constant exists at line 29 but is never loaded or used.

checks.name: ps1_material.gdshader completeness
checks.detail: ps1_material.gdshader: only vertex_snap + UV_snap. Missing key PS1/N64 effects: (1) affine texture mapping (remove perspective correction — quintessential PS1 warble), (2) per-vertex jitter (polygon wobble), (3) color quantization (PS1 had 15-bit color), (4) dithered transparency. Director q-20260412-004 explicitly requested N64/PS1 ultra-low-poly aesthetic.

checks.name: BrocSeason ground tint
checks.detail: broc_season.gd: GROUND_TINTS array defined (line ~23) but _apply_vegetation_tint() only calls _tint_recursive() on _forest_root children — NOT on the terrain mesh. Ground plane keeps default material regardless of season. Autumn/Winter ground should visibly change.

checks.name: time_of_day/season in run_state
checks.detail: DIR-S2-MNWXQ41M requires time_of_day + season exposed in run_state for LLM context. broceliande_forest_3d.gd has _day_night.get_time() and _season.get_current() but neither is written to store/run_state. LLM cannot vary narrative by time/season. Also store_run.gd lacks time_of_day/season fields.

checks.name: Summer heat haze shader quality
checks.detail: seasonal_particles.gdshader summer mode (season_type==1): only applies a faint color alpha overlay (haze = noise * 0.05 * density). No actual UV distortion/refraction — heat shimmer should displace UV coords using TIME-based sin wave, not just blend a color.

checks.name: Dead shader: bestiole_squish
checks.detail: shaders/bestiole_squish.gdshader exists but Bestiole system is listed as DELETED in game design bible (CLAUDE.md: Systemes SUPPRIMES: Bestiole). This shader is dead code consuming space and causing confusion.

checks.name: BrocScreenVfx particle burst correctness
checks.detail: trigger_burst(): sparkle/ember/pollen/water/leaves all spawn GPUParticles3D with SphereMesh draw pass. _cleanup_bursts() checks emitting flag. one_shot=true + explosiveness=0.9 correct for burst effects.
